title: The Ballpit
description: Adds a decorative ballpit into the game.
body:
It is a simple mod that adds a decorative ballpit into the game.

You can craft it by crafting the various ballpit balls by combining a clay ball and a dye (only Red, Orange, Yellow, Green, Blue, Purple, and White).

![The crafting recipe for a ballpit ball](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/52bce3ca2377ee76d3183cd2d0dded348cc1401a.png)

Then, you craft the empty ballpit with 5 blue wool.

![The crafting recipe for the empty ballpit.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7285fb60bf41108788019c62ba7051f548d15fb9.png)

Then you combine them together to get your ballpit.
![The crafting recipe for the ballpit.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0fe79fa8062d2891932ddc236b47c35acf36bdf3.png)
